reviews.review_title: Fantastic learning tool for the heart
reviews.review_description: I’m not in the medical field, but just interested in the anatomy of the human body - which I believe is the most complex structure in the known universe. And since the heart is the most important muscle in the body I was interested in this app. I thought it was mind blowing - to be able to see a virtual beating heart and move and rotate it with virtual hands and even see inside the vessels entering and leaving the heart. And the various descriptions of all the elements of the structure and function of the heart are excellent. I think VR is the future for these types of subjects. For anybody wanting a clear understanding of the human heart this is the right app!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback. There is also the in situ mode, that demonstrates the heart in its real scale. So you can appreciate how complex it is. The  app Understanding Heart Attack, shows what happens with the heart during a heat attack.
